Rimworld output log published using HugsLib

PowerShell script to auto-organize Downloads folder by file type with safe deletion (90-day grace period). Sorts files into 6 categories, ages Documents/Images to trash after 60 days, permanently deletes after 30 days in trash. Self-protects script and log. Works on Windows (Task Scheduler), macOS (launchd), Linux (cron). No dependencies.
